name: Jonathan Tunick
description: American orchestrator, musical director, and composer
abstract: Jonathan Tunick (born April 19, 1938) is an American orchestrator, musical director, and composer. He is best known for orchestrating the works of Stephen Sondheim, their collaboration starting in 1970 with Company and continuing until Sondheim's death in 2021.

works_created.t: I have found what you are like
To an Isle on the water
